1000614184.english: Next time, get official permission before going out.

1000614185.english: I'm looking forward to dinner tonight.

1000614193.english: It's much better if you make it yourself.

1000614195.english: It's still in my mouth... Wait a minute.

1000614204.english: I feel like my energy is coming back.

1000614207.english: Um... please make it super sweet.

1000614208.english: I want to eat something made with vanilla.

1000614209.english: You didn't get mad, did you?

1000614214.english: Well then... shall we try it?

1000614219.english: Can you leave that there too?

1000614221.english: Whatever you want, just try it.

1000614223.english: The scent is really good! Is Perrault also good?

1000614233.english: First of all... let me just say this...

1000614235.english: Okay, let's start the minor cooking competition!

1000614239.english: Hahaha, that's interesting. Then I'll go.

1000614247.english: This is not the time to be eating this.

1000614249.english: Uh... Okay, just wait a minute.

1000614255.english: Haha... I can barely make dessert.

1000614257.english: Please. Even if it's something simple...

1000614258.english: Perrault! I've been waiting for you.

1000614260.english: Haha! Of course, as a commander…

1000614262.english: Oh, no! This is enough for me.

1000614265.english: I fell asleep in an instant...

1000614272.english: Cooking is more profound than I thought…

1000614274.english: I'm telling you a story I heard from Fortune.

1000614282.english: Oh, I don't like glasses, but I like Constantia.

1000614283.english: Really. I'm really grateful to Constance.
1000614283.korean: 정말이야. 정말로 콘스탄챠에게 고마워 하고 있어.

1000614294.english: Excuse me. I have a question.

1000614297.english: It's nothing. Just get me a textbook.

1000614305.english: Please take care of the sky.

1000614310.english: You guys didn't tell me on purpose, did you?

1000614311.english: Please look at it this way.

1000614313.english: Please take care of me in the future.

1000614324.english: What the hell are you complaining about?!

1000614333.english: Sirene. Please sail to the island.

1000614334.english: How many shares should the treasure be divided into?

1000614340.english: Wouldn't it be a little hot in that outfit?!

1000614342.english: I'll take that as a compliment.

1000614345.english: Please take good care of Orca.

1000614347.english: You said you had a request, right?

1000614351.english: Sirene? I have something to tell you.

1000614352.english: Horizon will take care of the exploration.

1000614353.english: Well, I hope you find something useful…
1000614353.korean: 뭐, 쓸모 있는 걸 발견하면 좋으니까…

1000614355.english: Triaina? I have a favor to ask.

1000614357.english: It was fun with Sirene... fun...

1000614360.english: You shouldn't say that to Marie, right?
1000614360.korean: 마리한테 그렇게 말하면 안 될 텐데?

1000614361.english: What do you want to say?

1000614362.english: This is a place where Metal Parasites appear?!

1000614365.english: ...Should we launch a preemptive strike and set up camp?

1000614367.english: It's not a cancellation, it's an apology.

1000614368.english: Phew... I'd be a fool to hope for something like that.
1000614368.korean: 후... 그런 걸 바라면 내가 바보겠지.

1000614379.english: Huh? Where did Night Angel go?

1000614380.english: I feel like I can't see it

1000614381.english: May? Do you have something to say?

1000614382.english: Brownie and Leprechaun will have some free time.

1000614390.english: Where would something like that be...

1000614396.english: A pen? Why do you need one?

1000614401.english: I just have to apply them in order, right?

1000614402.english: Well then, please take care of it.

1000614407.english: ... Wait. I'll send troops right away.

1000614413.english: Aside from the results... is there anything else you want to report?
1000614413.korean: 성과 말고... 더 보고할 건 없어?

1000614416.english: Not to the point of worrying...

1000614418.english: Anyway, I was planning on having everyone join.

1000614419.english: Everyone, come back. Let's get together and re-plan.
1000614419.korean: 모두 복귀해. 모여서 계획을 다시 짜보자.

1000614421.english: Don't hit me with a button without even knowing what it is.

1000614425.korean: 우리 수영복 대원들이 한 건 해냈어.

1000614427.english: Oh! Right. I have to tell you that story.

1000614431.english: Sirene? I have a favor to ask.

1000614433.english: This is how a rusty door is supposed to open.
1000614433.korean: 녹슨 문은 원래 이렇게 여는 거야.

1000614434.english: Okay. Please take care of it.

1000614435.english: It's okay. You don't have to do that.

1000614436.english: Come on! Let's trust Captain Triaina!

1000614437.english: But just in case, Perrault, take care of the rear.
1000614437.korean: 그래도 혹시 모르니 페로는 후방을 맡아줘

1000614438.english: Sorry... I guess the only one I can trust here is Perrault.
1000614438.korean: 미안... 여기선 믿을 게 페로 밖에 없네.

1000614444.english: You don't have to worry, we've deployed our main force with the terrain in mind.
1000614444.korean: 지형을 생각해서 본대를 배치했으니 걱정할 필요 없어.

1000614445.english: Do you have anything to say?

1000614447.english: War Wolf! You can't run away there!

1000614448.english: Nereid. Would you like to come for a moment?

1000614452.english: Perrault, come here for a moment.

1000614453.english: I think I need to prepare for battle.
1000614453.korean: 전투 준비를 해야 할 것 같아.

1000614457.english: I absolutely cannot allow this. Don't tell Sirene yet!
1000614457.korean: 절대 허락 못 해. 세이렌에겐 아직 일러!

1000614461.english: Stop it. Sirene is in trouble.

1000614464.english: What, what are you talking about!

1000614465.english: Two, both of you, stop it.

1000614471.english: The bigger and more exciting the gift, the better...

1000614472.english: No, I'm just joking, don't take it too seriously.
1000614472.korean: 노, 농담이니 너무 진지하겐 듣지 마.

1000614475.english: The bigger and more exciting the gift, the better!

1000614484.english: Going to a bar... I'll let you.

1000614485.english: Still, I can't take Sirene with me.

1000614486.english: This time I won't let you off the hook.

1000614491.english: No problem. Please take care of the safe.

1000614492.english: I hope Hachiko is doing well too?

1000614498.english: ...I think I know the gist. My self-introduction is a bit cliche, though.
1000614498.korean: ... 대충 알 것 같아. 자기 소개가 좀 진부하긴 하지만

1000614499.english: Up to there. If it looks dangerous, I'll shoot.

1000614501.english: You must have a purpose for coming to me, right?

1000614502.english: What kind of deal are you talking about?

1000614506.english: What if I ignore you and plunder you?

1000614516.english: A trap? I've never seen anything like it before...

1000614518.english: Why is it separate from the system?
1000614518.korean: 어째서 시스템과 별개로 되어 있는 거지?

1000614520.english: Sirene? Do you have something to say?

1000614525.english: War Wolf and Charlotte are in danger.

1000614526.english: Yeah? Do you know what I mean?

1000614528.english: Isn't it too far from the main base?

1000614530.english: What the heck is this sound...

1000614531.english: Is that the guy you were talking about?

1000614532.english: Are you okay? ... I think my brother got infected...
1000614532.korean: 괜찮나? ... 아무래도 형제가 감염 당한 것 같은데...

1000614535.english: Yeah, this Roc is going to need some help.

1000614538.english: A thunderous trap... was this it?

1000614542.english: What kind of person was Angel?

1000614546.english: Wh, what are you talking about!

1000614548.english: That guy is our expedition leader.

1000614549.english: Just follow the expedition leader's instructions.

1000614550.english: Well... I'm in charge of commanding the battles myself, so there's no big problem.
1000614550.korean: 뭐... 전투 지휘는 내가 직접 하니 큰 문제는 없어.

1000614551.english: Triaina, you say we need to negotiate?

1000614552.english: Hmm... I think Triaina has something to say...
1000614552.korean: 음... 트리아이나가 말하고 싶은 게 있는 듯 한데...

1000614554.english: ...How could it not work with coconut?

1000614555.english: That's good... If you understand, should we stop moving again?

1000614557.english: At this point... wouldn't it be possible to solve it with May's forces?
1000614557.korean: 이 정도면... 메이의 병력으로도 해결 가능하지 않아?

1000614559.english: First, let's deal with that Metal Parasite first.

1000614561.english: Why do you look at me like that?

1000614562.english: What... what are you talking about?

1000614564.english: Let them both cut my knees.

1000614565.english: It's said to be a vault that holds the treasures of the Leoboros family...

1000614566.english: The word 'everything' must have another meaning, right?
1000614566.korean: 모든 것'이라는 말에는 다른 의미가 있겠지?

1000614567.english: Then... why did you ask us to cooperate?
1000614567.korean: 그럼... 어째서 우리에게 협력을 요청한 거야?

1000614568.english: Could it be... you're trying to commit suicide?

1000614571.english: When you feel threatened... your behavior patterns change?
1000614571.korean: 위협을 느끼면... 행동 패턴이 변한단 거야?

1000614574.english: Don't worry. The facility definitely hasn't completely collapsed.
1000614574.korean: 걱정 마. 분명히 시설이 완전히 무너진 건 아닐 거야.

1000614576.english: Okay. Shall we start exploring again?
1000614576.korean: 좋아. 그럼 다시 탐험을 시작해 볼까?

1000614578.english: First of all... Spriggan. Can you explain?

1000614583.english: First, both of you be quiet.
1000614583.korean: 일단 두 사람 다 조용히 해.

1000614585.english: I lay down and cut off my legs one by one

1000614586.english: You don't necessarily need a swimsuit, right?

1000614588.english: How about spending some time together at the beach?
1000614588.korean: 해변에서 같이 시간을 보내는 건 어때?

1000614589.english: Not two, but... and the sun is hot. Is there no way?
1000614589.korean: 둘은 아니지만... 그리고 햇볕이 뜨거워. 방법이 없을까?

1000614592.english: Okay. Let's wait a bit until Lise arrives.
1000614592.korean: 좋아. 리제가 올 때까지 조금 기다리자.

1000614599.english: Were you planning on going inside the vault?

1000614600.english: Would you like to take Spriggan with you?

1000614601.english: You mean where that guy was?

1000614603.english: It says here that you are going to get special sausages?
1000614603.korean: 여기엔 특제 소시지를 구하러 간다고 적혀있는데?

1000614604.english: Anyway, go with Spriggan. That's an order.

1000614605.english: If you don't hurry, you'll miss it. Good work.

1000614610.english: There's no need to say that.

1000614612.english: Okay, see you next time, Sowan.

1000614613.english: What are you all doing here?

1000614615.english: Good work. Are you hurt anywhere?

1000614617.english: I'm glad the two of you reconciled.

1000614620.english: Well then, shall we all eat together?

1000614625.english: Leave the search to Cerberus. I'm sure he'll do a good job.
1000614625.korean: 켈베로스에게 수색을 맡겨봐. 분명히 잘 할 거야.

1000614627.english: Doctor? I don't know what that is, but...

1000614628.english: Well... I guess it doesn't matter who becomes my colleague.
1000614628.korean: 뭐... 누구든 동료가 된다면 상관이 없겠지.

1000614631.english: ...Should we expand the search force and scope?

1000614632.english: Instead, make sure to bring it with you.

1000614633.english: If you're grateful... I should give you a Momo sticker, right?

1000614635.english: Well, shall we compromise on that?

1000614637.english: Listen carefully. Where are you now?

1000614644.english: How... how do you do that...

1000614647.english: Well, of course it's not the love the doctor talks about...
1000614647.korean: 무, 물론 닥터가 이야기하는 사랑은 아니지만...

1000614649.english: That's not wrong... but... it's misleading...
1000614649.korean: 틀린 말은 아닌데... 그... 오해의 소지가...

1000614650.english: Rather than that... shouldn't we be looking for white clay?
1000614650.korean: 그보다... 백토를 찾아야 하는 것 아냐?

1000614654.english: You... do you know what that means?

1000614656.english: First of all, Neodym did nothing wrong.

1000614659.english: ...Neodym is the one who's in the way...

1000614661.english: Neodym... There's almost no one among the Bioroids that can beat him?
1000614661.korean: 네오딤... 바이오로이드 중에서 이길 수 있는 애가 거의 없을걸?

1000614662.english: I don't think it would be a good idea to approach it as a protection.
1000614662.korean: 보호해 주는 걸로 접근하는 건 별로일 것 같아.

1000614673.english: What, what do you want to do?

1000614676.english: Yeah, whatever, let's go get it.

1000614682.english: Why, why are you doing that?

1000614683.english: Why don't you try using force? For example...

1000614686.english: Do it properly and run away, Triaina.

1000614687.english: Well, the doctor has a lot of knowledge, but... is it okay?
1000614687.korean: 뭐, 닥터 가 지식은 많지만… 괜찮을까?

1000614694.english: Forgive me and don't worry about it.

1000614697.english: Hey, let's go right now! Moonbit!

1000614705.english: Don't worry. I won't allow that to happen.
1000614705.korean: 걱정 마. 그런 일은 내가 허락하지 않을 테니까.

1000614708.english: Triaina. You're against violence, aren't you?

1000614710.english: Okay. Tell the other magical girls too.

1000614712.english: Wait a minute! What is that?!

1000614714.english: White clay! Please take care of the carols!

1000614716.english: Stop! The Demon King has already lost consciousness.

1000614717.english: Ah... It's like a sealing ritual...

1000614718.english: Every day, the Magic Gentleman commands.

1000614722.english: First, we need to interrogate him.

1000614736.english: Moonbit? What are you doing here?

1000614737.english: Do you want to eat this?

1000614738.english: Because there are still a lot of Metal Parasites left.

1000614745.english: It's a new full moon night...

1000614747.english: If it were always like today…

1000614754.english: Thanks for the hard work preparing, Vanilla.

1000614756.english: Yeah, it suits you well LRL.

1000614757.english: Take this and take your hands off the blindfold quickly.
1000614757.korean: 이거 받고, 얼른 안대에서 손 떼렴.

1000614761.english: Count Alvis. What is your business?!

1000614766.english: Let's compromise with a chocolate bar.

1000614767.english: Don't eat it all at once.

1000614772.english: Vanilla? Is there still any left?

1000614776.english: If you eat it all at once, you'll gain weight.

1000614788.english: Why didn't you just give me that cake?

1000614789.english: What?! Why on earth are you carrying that around?!
1000614789.korean: 뭐?! 그걸 대체 왜 들고 다니는 거야?!

1000614801.english: There's no need to do that.

1000614806.english: ...What are you talking about all of a sudden?

1000614811.english: Do not approach the danger zone.

1000614813.english: Do you want to get married?

1000614829.english: LRL, Alvis? Please take care of Fenrir.

1000614832.english: Do that. Just don't break anything.
1000614832.korean: 그렇게 해. 대신 물건을 부수진 마.

1000614843.english: Wait, Alice. Charlotte and Azazel too.

1000614845.english: Do you remember where Alvis and LRL fought earlier?
1000614845.korean: 아까 알비스랑 LRL이 전투했던 곳, 기억하지?

1000614846.english: I wish you could search the area to see if there are any more Metal Parasites left.
1000614846.korean: 근처에 철충들이 더 남아있는지 수색해줬으면 좋겠어

1000614847.english: When you arrive at the operation area...

1000614848.english: I will assign each of the three people an area to be in charge of.
1000614848.korean: 세 사람이 각각 맡을 구역을 지정해줄게.

1000614852.korean: 아, 어, 펜리르. 이 초대장 말인데...

1000614854.english: Fenrir, I have a question for you.

1000614856.english: Where is the party? Where is the party?

1000614859.english: We're going to a theme park. Get ready.

1000614860.english: Whatever it is, I will see it and judge it myself.
1000614860.korean: 뭐가 됐든, 내가 직접 보고 판단하겠어.

1000614861.english: Nice to meet you. Is this your first time seeing me in person?

1000614864.english: I'm sorry. My decision won't change.

1000614867.english: We're going to a theme park.

1000614870.english: Yeah, you did a great job. Thanks, Charlotte.

1000614872.english: Armand, do you know what I'm going to say?
1000614872.korean: 아르망. 내가 무슨 말을 할 지 알겠어?

1000614873.english: Yeah, anyone could have predicted this.
1000614873.korean: 그래. 이건 누구나 예측할 수 있을거야.

1000614875.english: ...Would you please clean up the remaining Metal Parasites?

1000614878.english: But I hope you believe me.

1000614879.english: Since I am the last human left in this world...
1000614879.korean: 내가 이 세상에 마지막으로 남은 인간인 이상...

1000614880.english: Fenrir, will you open the door?

1000614882.english: Alice, don't attack until I tell you to.
1000614882.korean: 앨리스, 내가 말하기 전까진 공격하지 마.

1000614889.english: Dutch Girl, let's go out together.

1000614891.english: Charlotte and Alice are going. Stay here.
1000614891.korean: 샬럿이랑 앨리스가 갈 거야. 여기 있어.

1000614893.english: Please, Dutch Girl. Stay by my side.

1000614895.english: Dutch Girl, are you okay now?

1000614897.english: If it's hard, it's okay not to say anything.

1000614901.english: It can't be helped that some damage occurs in the surrounding area.
1000614901.korean: 주변에 다소 피해가 발생하는 건 어쩔 수 없겠지.

1000614902.english: Charlotte, Alice. Please... no, I'll give you an order.

1000614903.english: Sweep away all the Metal Parasites.

1000614907.english: I'm sorry I couldn't take care of you properly.

1000614908.english: I'm sorry. Can you compensate me?

1000614911.english: Are you popular with the kids?

1000614914.english: I asked you to trust me.

1000614915.english: Really? Can you tell me what kind of prophecy it is?

1000614918.english: Circe, can I ask you something?

1000614919.english: I came here to check something.
1000614919.korean: 나는 여기에 확인할 게 있어서 왔어.

1000614920.english: The area I'm going to guide you through from now on...

1000614921.english: Do you know what happened there?

1000614924.english: I have a rough idea of ​​the location.

1000614928.english: Trust me, Armand has nothing to worry about.

1000614929.english: Then Fenrir, will you protect me?

1000614930.english: Yeah. I survived thanks to Alvis.

1000614933.english: Where the hell... where the hell did you get those clothes...

1000614934.english: Wait, wait. I'll give you some candy...

1000614940.english: ...I'll try it next time I get the chance.

1000614942.english: Circe, I think I've seen enough here.
1000614942.korean: 키르케, 여기는 충분히 본 것 같아.

1000614943.english: Guide me to the next area.

1000614945.english: Tell me when it's all over...

1000614947.english: Do you know what it means to be on good terms?

1000614949.english: I guess it's okay until I see that note...

1000614950.english: No, I'm fine. More than that...

1000614951.english: Circe. Isn't there another area besides this one?
1000614951.korean: 키르케. 여기 말고, 또 다른 구역이 있지 않아?

1000614955.english: I'm on the phone! Just stay away from me for a second, Alice!
1000614955.korean: 통신 중이야! 잠깐만 떨어져 있어 앨리스!

1000614957.english: Okay, okay... just wait a minute.

1000614958.english: Alice! Just a moment. Let go of my hand!
1000614958.korean: 앨리스! 잠깐이면 돼. 이 손 놔!

1000614960.english: I like that design! Let's go with that.

1000614961.english: Sorry. I'm busy, so I'll have to stop here. See you at Orca.
1000614961.korean: 미안. 바빠서 여기까지 해야겠어. 오르카에서 봐.

1000614965.english: ...Okay. I'll just take a quick break and come back.

1000614969.english: Oh, oh?! Oh, that's what you were researching!

1000614970.english: Oh, yeah. You grew up well, Doctor.

1000614971.english: Well then, take care. I'll go.

1000614973.english: Yeah, I really like it. Thank you.

1000614975.english: Uh, but is the research finished now?
1000614975.korean: 그, 그런데 이제 연구는 다 끝난거야?

1000614976.english: So, can you give me a hint as to what will happen when it's finished?
1000614976.korean: 그럼 완성되면 어떻게 되는지 힌트라도 줄래?

1000614977.english: Oh, Doctor. There's something I need your help with.
1000614977.korean: 아, 닥터. 도와줬으면 하는 일이 있어.

1000614978.korean: 내가 산타가 될 수 있게 도와줘.

1000614980.english: Doctor, come down for a moment. What's going on?

1000614981.english: Hi. Didn't War Wolf come out with you too?

1000614982.english: No, I like seeing them because they seem to be on good terms.
1000614982.korean: 아냐, 사이가 좋은 것 같아서 보기 좋아.

1000614983.english: Okay. If there's anything unusual, please contact me again.
1000614983.korean: 알았어. 특이 사항이 있으면 다시 연락해.

1000614985.english: I'm worried about Camel and Werewolf because it's a snow operation...

1000614987.english: It's not that I don't trust Khan. I'm sorry for interfering.
1000614987.korean: 칸을 못 믿는 건 아니야. 간섭해서 미안해.

1000614988.english: Thank you. You all fought well.

1000614990.english: I want to give back to you in some way.

1000614991.english: So I'm planning to prepare a surprise party and gifts.

1000614992.english: I don't think it'll be easy to do this alone. Doctor, can you help me?
1000614992.korean: 혼자선 아무래도 힘들 것 같아. 닥터, 도와줄래?

1000614994.english: First of all, let's start with clothes.

1000614995.english: No, I never said anything like that...
1000614995.korean: 아니, 그런 말은 한 적은 없는데...

1000614996.english: Doctor, it's not your physical age that matters.
1000614996.korean: 닥터, 신체 나이가 중요한 게 아니야.

1000614997.english: You have to be mentally prepared as well.

1000614998.english: First of all, won't you help me become Santa?
1000614998.korean: 일단 내가 산타가 되는 걸 도와주지 않을래?

1000614999.english: Right now, there's no one I can trust but the doctor.

1000615000.english: Please, I need your help, Doctor.

1000615005.english: Yeah, please take care of it. But...

1000615006.english: Are you okay? It won't be easy to sneak out.

1000615011.english: No, not that. What the heck are these pictures?
1000615011.korean: 아니, 그거 말고. 이 사진들은 대체 뭐야?

1000615014.english: No, it's okay. And I'll delete all of this.
1000615014.korean: 아니, 괜찮아. 그리고 이건 전부 삭제할게.

1000615015.english: Let's go outside Orca first. Can you show me around?

1000615017.english: That secret network is also banned.

1000615023.english: Um, sorry. I was surprised too...

1000615025.english: No, no. I really don't think that's right...
1000615025.korean: 아니, 아니야. 이건 정말 아닌 것 같아...

1000615027.english: Yes! Fotia, did you bring the gauntlets?

1000615028.english: Can you melt my eyes with that?

1000615029.english: Yeah, thanks to Fotia, I'll be able to go comfortably. Oh, wait...
1000615029.korean: 응, 포티아 덕분에 편하게 갈 수 있겠어. 아, 잠깐...

1000615030.english: Let's go. Feather and Alexandra, stop grumbling and follow me.
1000615030.korean: 가자. 페더랑 알렉산드라도 그만 투덜거리고 따라와.

1000615031.english: You've worked hard. Take a break.

1000615033.english: Feather, would you mind scouting the area?

1000615034.english: Well... I still feel a bit awkward taking something like this.
1000615034.korean: 음... 그래도 이런걸 가져가기는 조금 그렇네.

1000615036.english: In addition to the surprise gift, we'll also throw a party.

1000615037.english: I'll go back and forth a few times. With this backpack, I'll be fine.
1000615037.korean: 몇 번 왕복하지 뭐. 이 배낭이 있으니 어떻게든 될 거야.

1000615045.english: Okay, let's get back to business. I have a lot to do.
1000615045.korean: 난 됐으니까 본론으로 돌아가자. 할 일이 많아.

1000615053.english: Why do you like taking pictures?

1000615054.english: Hmm... I think I get it.

1000615061.english: The Horde doesn't have any other missions today besides scouting, right?
1000615061.korean: 오늘 호드는 정찰 말고 다른 임무가 없지 않아?

1000615063.english: I am especially grateful to the Horde.

1000615064.english: I need to find out how the Horde usually does.
1000615064.korean: 호드는 평소에 어떻게 지내는 지 알아봐야겠어.

1000615065.english: No, it's better to see it for yourself.
1000615065.korean: 아냐, 직접 보는 게 더 확실할거야.

1000615067.english: Yeah, thanks to you I survived.

1000615070.english: It'll be okay because Miho's here, right?

1000615071.english: You pretended not to know, and now you're confessing?

1000615078.english: The city certainly looks fine, but what about the shopping mall?

1000615079.english: Doctor, what else did Leona say?
1000615079.korean: 닥터, 레오나가 또 무슨 말을 하지 않았어?

1000615081.english: Does Leona know what I'm preparing?
1000615081.korean: 레오나도 내가 준비하는 걸 알고 있는 거야?

1000615083.english: Then let's go right away... Ah, Constantia.

1000615084.english: Okay. I'll take care of the work when I have time.

1000615085.english: Uh... isn't that a bit much?

1000615089.english: Where, the person in charge of escort today...

1000615091.english: Feather? Wouldn't it be better to ask Phantom instead of Feather?
1000615091.korean: 페더? 페더보단 팬텀한테 부탁하는 게 낫지 않을까?

1000615092.english: Is there anything I don't know about Feather?
1000615092.korean: 내가 페더에 대해 모르는 게 있어?

1000615095.english: Yeah, thanks. I almost got in big trouble...

1000615098.english: It's nothing. I'm just a little tired.
1000615098.korean: 별 거 아냐. 조금 피곤해서 그래.

1000615102.english: So, do you want to guess what I'm thinking right now?
1000615102.korean: 그럼 내가 지금 무슨 생각을 하고 있는지 맞춰 볼래?

1000615103.korean: 그래? 내가 무슨 생각을 하고 있어?

1000615106.english: If you like anything, you can take it.
1000615106.korean: 마음에 드는 거 있으면 가져가도 돼.

1000615109.english: Last time... you said you'd let me taste some cheesecake, right?

1000615110.english: Can I go back and ask you something? I'm hungry.

1000615111.english: I'm looking forward to it. Now that you've chosen what you want, shall we go?
1000615111.korean: 기대되네. 갖고 싶은 거 골랐으면 슬슬 갈까?

1000615120.english: Yeah, I don't think there's any problem.
1000615120.korean: 응. 별 문제 없는 것 같아.

1000615122.english: Ugh... I don't have time for that.

1000615124.english: Well, I guess I'll need to take a break. Will you stay with me?

1000615127.english: ...It reminds me of the old days.

1000615132.english: Yeah... Go first and tell him I'm sorry.

1000615133.english: You're doing this because you care about me.

1000615135.english: I see... Do you want to come in?

1000615141.english: Commanding the Horde won't be easy...

1000615146.english: It looks warm. I'll go in.

1000615151.english: I'll take care of the preparations later. For now, let's go to sleep.
1000615151.korean: 준비한 건 나중에 부탁해. 지금은 일단 자자.

1000615153.english: Didn't you hear something just now?

1000615157.english: I'm sorry. I didn't think about it.

1000615158.english: ...Don't you have some time until the party?

1000615168.english: No. I'm fine with it, but it's rude to the other person.
1000615168.korean: 안 돼. 나는 괜찮아도, 상대에게 실례야.

1000615170.english: Will you continue taking pictures like this in the future?

1000615171.english: Thank you. Please take care of me at this party too.

1000615172.english: Let's go to the party hall soon.

1000615175.english: Hmm... The doctor must have had a hard time...

1000615177.english: Everyone... thank you for saying that.

1000615178.english: Actually, I didn't prepare much, but... enjoy it.
1000615178.korean: 정작 내가 많이 준비하지는 못했지만... 즐겨줘.

1000615179.english: The people who helped me went through all the trouble. Especially the doctor and... huh?
1000615179.korean: 고생은 날 도와준 대원들이 했지. 특히 닥터랑... 어?

1000615180.english: Leona, have you seen the Doctor?

1000615181.english: Really? I should look it up.

1000615183.english: Okay, okay. Tell them I'm looking for them.
